text:
is a Japanese company that manufactures plastic model kits of a variety of vehicles, including model aircraft, model cars, model ships, model armor, model space craft and science fiction kits. It based in Shizuoka, Japan. It was founded in 1941 and entered into the plastic model field in 1961.

MechatroWeGo x EVANGELION collaboration

"MechatroWeGo" is an original robot created by Moderhythm/Kazushi Kobayashi, designed for children to use on their way to school and for recreation. It was made into a plastic model in 2015. The box art for the plastic models were illustrated by the manga artist .
